title: Thai-Style Khanom Krok with Coconut Milk
description: A traditional Thai dessert with a rich, creamy flavor made with coconut milk and topped with khanom krok and a sprinkle of soy for extra flavor.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or khanom krok mold over medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add in coconut milk and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add in soy sauce and vanilla extract, and mix well.
Pour the batter into the preheated pan or khanom krok mold.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges towards the center.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until the khanom krok is cooked through.
Serve warm and top with khanom krok and a sprinkle of soy for extra flavor.
Enjoy your delicious Thai-Style Khanom Krok with Coconut Milk!
